description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21, update build configuration (pom.xml or build.gradle) to target Java 21, resolve any compatibility issues with deprecated APIs, and migrate javax.* imports to jakarta.* namespace if needed
tasks.summary: Java upgraded from 1.8 to 21. Updated pom.xml compiler settings, modernized Optional API usage via OpenRewrite. Build passed, unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest stable)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4.x, Spring Framework to 6.x, update all Spring dependencies to compatible versions, migrate from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace, update configuration properties that have changed, and resolve any breaking changes in Spring Boot 3.x
tasks.summary: Spring Boot upgraded from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Spring Framework updated to 6.x, javax to jakarta namespace migration completed. Build passed, unit tests passed.

tasks.description: Upgrade third-party dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all third-party dependencies to their latest versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, resolve any transitive dependency conflicts, ensure all dependencies support jakarta.* namespace, and verify compatibility across the dependency tree
tasks.summary: Upgraded commons-io:commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.18.0 to fix CVE-2024-47554 (HIGH severity). Build passed, unit tests passed, no remaining CVEs.
